category.name: zoo.window.crafting
category.item: You have collected %mycards% of %allcards% building plans!
Crafters and hobbyists beware! Use your materials to build new enclosures, buildings, decorations, or paths. Simply select a category below and proceed to the next stage of production.

It's very simple: At the bottom left you see what is currently being produced. The construction plan shows you what materials you need. Above that you see the production time and the number of paws you have to pay. Do you understand? Okay, then click "Start".
Save time and finish production immediately!
Speed ​​up and complete production in half the time.
Hooray! All done: the item you just crafted can be found in your inventory!
Hooray! You just received a building plan! Head to the workshop and build a new item for your zoo!
